titleStmt.title: SII 5.668: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 668. (A.R. No. 107 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kāntaḷūrccālai kalam maṟutta kovirājarājakecaripanma ṟkku yāṇṭu pattāva
tu kunṟakkūṟṟattu brahma teyam ciṟupaḻuvūr cāvānti tirunilakaṇṭan civanum Ivan makan
nakkanum Ivvoruvom viṟṟuk kuṭutta vilaiyāvaṇam Ivvūrt tiruvālantuṟai mahā te
varkku Aṭikaḷ paḻuveṭṭaraiyar kaṇṭan maṟavanār koṇṭu kuṭutta nilammāvatu Icci
ṟupaḻuvūr melūr Aiyankuḷattin kiḻ nāṅkaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpārk
kellai cāvānti nārāyaṇan centan Uḷḷiṭṭār kūṭṭattār Aṉaivomum viṟkinṟa nilat
tukku meṟkkum tenpārk kellai puṟakkuḻikkum kaḻanikkum puṟakuḻi Erikku vaṭakku
mepāṟk kellai Erikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟk kellai peruvaḻikku teṟkkum Icai
tta perunān kellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilam pattu Innilam mikitik kuṟaivu
Uḷḷaṭaṅka pattucceyyum Ikkaḻanikkup pāya Uṭaiykuḷamum viṟṟukkuṭu
ttuk koṇṭa vilaipporuḷ Ulavi pon Irupatin kaḻañcu ponnukkum Inni
lamum Ikkuḷamum viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Innilattukkum Ikkuḷattukkum Ituve
vilaiyāvaṇamum poruḷ māvaṟutip poruḷccela volaiyāvatākavum Itu val
latu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruḷ celavolai kāṭṭakkaṭavarallātārākavum Ippari coṭṭi
Āvaṇakkaḷiye Irupatin kaḻañcu ponnukku Ivvilaik kaṟaviṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟ
ṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom tiruvālantuṟai mahātevarkku cāvānti tirunīlakaṇ
ṭan civanum Ivan makan civan ṉakkanum Ivviruvom Itu panma heśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 5.668 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
